title: STATUS | 10 Meters | 10 A Double Socket Cassette Reel with Thermal Out | Orange | S10A10MCR6
features: Ideal for the garage, workshop or home
2 Way extension connect up to 2 devices
description: From the manufacturer Powered Up and Tangle-Free Introducing Status' high-visibility A-frame cable reel, a steadfast companion for any workspace or household. With its four sockets and 25-meter cable length, this trusty reel ensures ample power distribution throughout your domain. Safety Features Rest assured with our thermal cut-off features, diligently safeguarding against overheating by automatically disengaging power in case of excessive temperatures. Its high-visibility casing not only offers easy identification but also minimizes tripping hazards, providing peace of mind in bustling environments. More Infomation Features 4 sockets 25-meter cable length Constructed with sturdy materials Built-in thermal cut-out function Delivers up to 3120 watts of power Power Your Space with Ease Featuring four sockets, this reel allows you to connect multiple devices simultaneously, making it perfect for workshops, offices, or even dry outdoor spaces. With an 18-meter cable length, you'll have ample reach without the hassle of tangled cords. Built with durability in mind, this reel is designed to withstand frequent use, ensuring longevity. Additionally, its integrated thermal cut-out technology protects your devices from overheating and electrical hazards. Whether you're tackling DIY projects or simply need extra power around the house, the Status Cable Reel offers convenience and peace of mind. Features Up-to 50 Metre Cable Unlock freedom and flexibility with our 50-meter cable reel. Say goodbye to restrictive power sources and hello to the convenience of reaching even the most distant corners of your workspace, garden, or home. Don't let short cables hold you back – upgrade to our 50m cable length reels and enjoy uninterrupted power wherever you go. Thermal Cut-out Feature Stay safe and secure with our cable reels equipped with a thermal cutout feature. This innovative technology ensures automatic power shutdown in the event of overheating, providing an added layer of protection for you and your devices. With this feature, you can use our cable reels with confidence, knowing that your safety is our top priority. 4 Gang Outlets Enjoy unmatched versatility with our cable reels featuring up to 4 gang outlets. With multiple sockets available, you can conveniently power up to four devices simultaneously, eliminating the need for multiple power sources. Whether you're working in the garage, setting up a workstation, or hosting events, our cable reels provide the flexibility you need to stay connected. Convenient Wind-up Handle Simplify your power management with our convenient wind-up handle feature. With just a few quick rotations, you can effortlessly wind up the cable reel for tidy storage and transportation. Whether you're finishing up a DIY project or packing up your tools for the day, our cable reels with a convenient wind-up handle ensure hassle-free organization every time. Custom Portability Power up anywhere with our cable reels built for portability. Whether you're on a job site, camping in the great outdoors, or simply need power in hard-to-reach places, our cable reels have got you covered. Compact and lightweight, they're easy to carry and store, making them perfect for on-the-go use. 13 Amp Output Our cable reels boast a robust power output of 13 amps. When fully unwound, they deliver an impressive 3120 watts of power, ensuring a robust and reliable energy source for your operations. Bid farewell to power constraints and embrace boundless potential with our commanding cable reels.
